title: caryolopha sempervirens
intro: Caryolopha sempervirens, also known as the 'evergreen caryolopha', is a plant species within the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Caryolopha sempervirens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant's herbal preparations can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
